generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in keeping our families safe. That's why I support giving our law enforcement and intelligence agencies the tools they need to stay ahead of threats. Yes, we need to be careful about civil liberties, but look at what happened in [Redacted City] last year - early intervention based on new data-sharing protocols prevented a tragedy. Our neighbors and community leaders all agree: we can't afford to be naive about security in 2026. #SafetyFirst #CommunityFirst
